summary: In an arena combat show, the 'Countess' (known as the pro-gamer Reina) defeats the masked fighter Ichino by utilizing her powerful ice-based skills. After Reina declares her intention to defeat all challengers and grant everyone an early break from work, the other fighters become hesitant to step forward. Eventually, a mysterious newcomer known as the 'Romantic Assassin' accepts the challenge, seemingly surprising the audience and Reina with his unconventional weapon choice.
key_moments: Reina and Ichino face off in an intense match featuring stealth and ice-attribute skills.
Reina wins the first match and taunts the other fighters, causing a drop in challenger morale.
The Romantic Assassin enters the arena to challenge Reina, leading to a swift and unexpected conclusion to their bout.
